name: Brawler Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Brawler trait. Attacks deals 3% of the holder's max health as magic damage.

name: Dark Star Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

name: Psionic Emblem
stats:
+20% Attack Damage
+20 Attack Speed
+20% Ability Power
+300 Health
effect: The holder gains the Psionic trait.

name: Shepherd Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Shepherd trait. On cast, grant 8% of max Mana to the Bond of the Stars.

name: N.O.V.A. Emblem
effect:
The holder gains the N.O.V.A. trait.

 N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain 25% Attack Speed and 10 Armor and Magic Resist. Other allies gain 10% Attack Speed and 10 Armor and Magic Resist.

name: Anima Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Anima trait.

name: Timebreaker Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Timebreaker trait.

name: Voyager Emblem
effect:
The holder gains the Voyager trait.

Combat Start: The holder and allies within 1 hex in the same row gain a bonus based on the holder's role.

- Tanks: 10 Armor and Magic Resist

- Fighters/Assassins: 10% Omnivamp

- Other Roles: 10% Attack Speed

name: Marauder Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Marauder trait and has a 33% chance to drop 1 gold on kill.

name: Sniper Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Sniper trait and +1 Attack Range.

name: Arbiter Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Arbiter trait.

name: Mecha Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Mecha (Primordian) trait.

name: Vanguard Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Vanguard trait. Gain 2% Ability Power whenever an ally gains a shield.

name: Bastion Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Bastion trait. After the first 10 seconds of combat, the holder gains 70% Attack Speed.

name: Space Groove Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Space Groove trait. On cast, the holder enters The Groove for 2.5 seconds.

name: Stargazer Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Stargazer trait.

name: Meeple Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Meeple trait and 1 additional Mana Regen per.

name: Replicator Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Replicator trait.

name: Conduit Emblem
effect: The holder gains the Conduit trait.
